name: thehitchhikersguidetodfirexperiencesfrombeginnersandexperts
description: The official repo for a project involving a crowdsourced DFIR book. The main purpose of this book is to give anyone interested an opportunity to write a chapter of a book to get their name out there, get a publication on their resume with an actual ISBN number, and ideally lower the bar for people to contribute something back to the DFIR Community. Want to write a chapter? Let me know and let's make it happen!
description_ja: クラウドソーシングによる DFIR 本プロジェクトの公式リポジトリ。この本の主な目的は、興味のある誰もが章を執筆し、名前を広め、実際の ISBN 番号付きの出版物を履歴書に加え、DFIR コミュニティへ貢献するハードルを下げること。執筆に参加したい方はぜひご連絡を！
